历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 3444 → 3182 → 2421 → 1936, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 1508 places in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1936; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science (physics category) was 104 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 95 students, a reduction of 9 students (-8.65%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue is under investigation for serious violations of discipline and law, involving academic misconduct); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 85th, comprehensive popularity 276,000); there were signs of admission gaps in 2024 (medium attention), and in 2025, the admission score for the Underground Space Engineering major in Chongqing was 20 points below the special line. Overall, negative public opinion may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Strong disciplines such as medicine, materials, and computer science are highly correlated with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), and other advantageous engineering and medical majors at Central South University have consistently high social popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture (differentiated and wait-and-see), Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials (clearly discouraged) have lower popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Ningxia is about 66,000 (basically unchanged from 65,897 in 2025), with an estimated 44,550 in the physics category, a slight increase; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the central region, which has a certain geographical distance for candidates from the northwestern province of Ningxia; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (12 students out of 598 nationwide in 2025), a very small proportion, belonging to out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the reduction of 9 students in 2026 (easing competition), the somewhat negative university reputation (which may suppress application enthusiasm), the basically unchanged total number of examinees, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the ranking is expected to continue to advance slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 1936; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1806, with a range of 1535–2077.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1535–2077, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1500), focus on top-tier majors such as Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 2000), choose Tier 3 majors like Materials and Chemical Engineering as stable options, while also aiming for Tier 2 majors such as Software Engineering and Automation. Central South University's metallurgy and materials disciplines are top in the country, and although they fall under the discouraged category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, their academic strength is extremely strong, and employment has industry barriers, making them worth attention.
